message:
fix(clippy): Resolve linting errors in TUI widgets and E2E tests

- Add allow(clippy::field_reassign_with_default) to tui/widgets.rs test module
- Refactor tests to use proper struct initialization with ..Default::default()
- Fix format! macro usage in e2e_worker.rs (unnecessary format)
- Replace len() > 0 with is_empty() for cleaner lint compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
